The Model X Signature starts at $159,420. items.title: What I Learned at My First KubeCon + CloudNativeCon as a High School Speaker
items.summary: KubeCon + CloudNativeCon Europe 2026 is one of the biggest open-source conferences in the world, organized by the Cloud Native Computing Foundation (part of the Linux Foundation, which manages major projects like Linux). It brings together...
items.content: KubeCon + CloudNativeCon Europe 2026 is one of the biggest open-source conferences in the world, organized by the Cloud Native Computing Foundation (part of the Linux Foundation, which manages major projects like Linux). It brings together the global cloud native community, and being selected as a speaker is extremely competitive, with acceptance rates in the single digits. This year, over 13,000 people gathered in Amsterdam in March.
items.author: Avery Yang, Student at North Carolina School of Science and Mathematics

items.title: AI 서비스 PM, 이제 '기획'을 넘어 '평가'를 설계하라
items.summary: 최근 생성형 AI 서비스가 급증하며 PM의 역할에 근본적인 변화가 생기고 있습니다. 이는 QA역할에서도 마찬가지인데요. 과거 PM이 요구사항(Spec)을 정의하고 QA가 기능의 정상 작동(Pass/Fail)을 검증했다면, AI 시대의 품질은 PM이 직접 '정의'하고 '평가'해야 하는 영역이 되었습니다.
items.content: 최근 생성형 AI 서비스가 급증하며 PM의 역할에 근본적인 변화가 생기고 있습니다. 이는 QA역할에서도 마찬가지인데요. 과거 PM이 요구사항(Spec)을 정의하고 QA가 기능의 정상 작동(Pass/Fail)을 검증했다면, AI 시대의 품질은 PM이 직접 '정의'하고 '평가'해야 하는 영역이 되었습니다.

items.title: The Core Issue: The Role and History of Bitcoin Core Maintainers
items.summary: Bitcoin Magazine The Core Issue: The Role and History of Bitcoin Core Maintainers Bitcoin Core’s maintainer system began with Satoshi Nakamoto merging every commit himself. Today, trusted key holders like Ava Chow, Gloria Zhao and the newly added TheCharlatan control merges to the master branch—ensuring the $2T+ network’s stability through merit-based consensus.
items.content: Bitcoin Magazine The Core Issue: The Role and History of Bitcoin Core Maintainers Don’t miss your chance to own The Core Issue — featuring articles written by many Core Developers explaining the projects they work on themselves! In the beginning there was only Satoshi Nakamoto and a powerful idea.

items.title: Citizen Lab: Law Enforcement Used Webloc to Track 500 Million Devices via Ad Data
items.summary: Hungarian domestic intelligence, the national police in El Salvador, and several U.S. law enforcement and police departments have been attributed to the use of an advertising-based global geolocation surveillance system called Webloc. The tool was developed by Israeli company Cobwebs Technologies and is now sold by its successor Penlink after the two firms merged in July 2023
items.author: info@thehackernews.com (The Hacker News)
